imap_mandatory_today.execute: Per Batch 5 lead — immediately. Reply wave CLOSES TODAY (72h+ post-Day-7). This is the absolute final check before Day-14. 48-day IMAP gap. Thursday sweep UNCONFIRMED.
imap_mandatory_today.priority: Highest urgency. Reply wave closes today. Final window before Day-14 (Tuesday 2026-05-26).
imap_mandatory_today.ooo_deadline: Day-14 is Tuesday 2026-05-26. Any OOO lead with return date AFTER 2026-05-25 cannot receive Day-14 (4-touchpoint hard limit). Mark sequence complete.

outcomes_and_actions.if_interested: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json (full raw text). Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-14 send for that lead — use proposal flow instead. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h from reply time (NON-NEGOTIABLE — 24/7). Log CHANGELOG. Add entry to value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads. Update CRM to proposal_sent.
outcomes_and_actions.if_not_interested: Classify here as NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.
outcomes_and_actions.if_unsubscribe: Classify here as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Cancel Day-14.
outcomes_and_actions.if_ooo: Classify here as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Return MUST be before 2026-05-25 to receive Day-14. If return after 2026-05-25: mark sequence complete (4-touchpoint limit — cannot send Day-14 after they've returned post-send date). Do NOT pause for OOO returns after 2026-05-25.
outcomes_and_actions.if_wrong_person: Classify here as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_clean: No action. Proceed with Day-14 on 2026-05-26 for all non-suppressed Batch 5 leads.

post_day7_monitoring_summary.friday_final_check: TODAY Fri 2026-05-22 (72h+ post-send) — FINAL. Reply wave closes after today.
post_day7_monitoring_summary.imap_coverage: Wednesday sweep: UNCONFIRMED. Thursday sweep: UNCONFIRMED. Friday sweep: MANDATORY TODAY — covers all three missed windows.
post_day7_monitoring_summary.note: Day-7 post-send window is historically the strongest reply window for undecided leads. 72h is the peak. After today, the reply curve drops sharply and remaining replies will be sporadic. Do not miss this final window.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-14 for this lead (use proposal flow instead — do NOT send breakup to an interested lead). Reply in thread or via preferred channel. Proposal within 24h from reply time (24/7 — NON-NEGOTIABLE). Update value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads. Log CHANGELOG.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never received it. That does not repeat. 24h applies 24/7 including weekends.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Return MUST be before 2026-05-25 to receive Day-14. If return date is 2026-05-26 or later: mark sequence complete — cannot send Day-14 (4-touchpoint hard limit). Do NOT extend sequence past Day-14 for OOO.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website or Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Cancel Day-14. Suppress ALL channels permanently within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
